# Visualization

Here, we talk about figures.

In summary, this book has no content whatsoever. 
This is another plain text sentence. 
**This is a bold face sentence.**

1. First point
2. Second point

## Heatmap

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
df = penguins %>% 
  select(species, island) %>% 
  table() %>% 
  as.data.frame

ggplot(data = df) +
  geom_raster(aes(x = species, y = island, fill = Freq)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c()
```
